violations.text: An allergen statement was observed not viewable to the customers at the menu/point of sale. PIC is to ensure an allergen awareness statement is viewable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

Wood is used in the construction of cabinet used for the coffee machine (in poor repair) and the counter backsplash behind the toppings at the hand sink area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. PIC is to obtain test strips to ensure proper chlorine levels in the 3 bay sink sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
